<!--
  Thanks for opening a PR! Please fill out the sections below so reviewers
  have the context they need. Delete any section that doesn't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? One or two sentences is fine. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] ✨ Feature (new behaviour visible to the user)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (corrects incorrect behaviour)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adds or improves tests)
- [ ] 📝 Docs (README / inline docs / comments)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / tooling / CI
- [ ] 🚨 Breaking change

## Related issues / context

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Part of #45", design link, etc. -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after screenshots or a short screen recording (Android emulator is fine). -->

| Before | After |
| ------ | ----- |
|        |       |

## How to test

<!-- Steps a reviewer can follow on their machine or emulator. -->

1.
2.
3.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code builds locally (`npm run android` or `npm start`)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (and new tests were added if behaviour changed)
- [ ] No new console warnings introduced
- [ ] Updated `.env.example` if new env vars were added
- [ ] Updated README / docs if developer-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] Native changes (if any) have been tested on a real device or emulator
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or PII committed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything you want reviewers to pay extra attention to. -->
